title: Doniphon
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:9doniphon.jpg]] |name=Doniphon |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and its [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] define the border of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] and the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] as the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]. *[[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] |sector=[[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]] |system=[[Doniphon system/Legends|Doniphon system]] |coordinates=P-4 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain=*Hills{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-11-serving-the-empire|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 11: Serving the Empire}} *Plains *[[River]]s |water= |interest=*[[Pyrand River]] *[[Selpathian Hills]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=[[Damatua]] |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|Sergeant Valance, do you remember the encounter on Doniphon?"
"Doniphon..."
"What is the last thing you remember, Sergeant?"
"Remember? I don't... ah. Kriff it.|[[4A8-RA-7]] and Beilert Valance after the latter was severely wounded on Doniphon|}} '''Doniphon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]], in the [[Doniphon system/Legends|system of the same name]]. Doniphon was [[Assault on Doniphon|invaded]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], during the Empire's [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|suppressions]] of rebel activity in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. An Imperial platoon succeeded in rooting out Doniphon's dissidents, although promising [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Stormtrooper Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] suffered grave wounds in the process. ==Description== Located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] Kwymar sector,{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin1|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 1|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 1}} Doniphon lended its name to the [[Doniphon system/Legends|system]] it called home. The [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] terrain was characterized by hills, plains and [[river]]s. ==History== {{Quote|Rebels. They were dug into the Selpathian Hills, low on ammunition. We were on the plain, manning the AV-9. Somehow they got a transmission through the jamming. The rebels at Damatua sent starfighters.|Beilert Valance describes the assault on Doniphon|}} During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], Doniphon became a hotspot of combat, as one of the worlds caught up in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] campaign known as the Kwymar Suppressions. Along with several of its Kwymar sector neighbors, Doniphon became the site of [[Assault on Doniphon|violent battle]] between local rebels and Imperial forces led by an ambitious young [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Stormtrooper Commander/Legends|commander]] named [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]]. During the assault on Doniphon, Valance and his crew cleared a rebel outpost near the [[Pyrand River]] in brutal close-quarters fighting, advancing from there to move on fighters dug into the [[Selpathian Hills]] the next day. Although the Imperials were jamming their transmissions, the rebels managed to get a transmission through to compatriots in the town of [[Damatua]], who sent [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] that strafed Valance's platoon. Although the Selpathian rebels were soon terminated, the squad sustained 21 casualties, Valance among them. Although the commander survived, the Imperial assault on Doniphon proved to be Valance's last mission with the Empire,{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin2|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2}} as his extensive injuries forced him to be relocated to [[Anglebay Station]] on [[Telos IV]], where he was rebuilt with [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] parts. ==Behind the scenes== Although Doniphon appears in a flashback in the [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel]] comic,[[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]] the site of Valance's injuries went unidentified until [[2004]], when author [[Jason Fry]] gave it the name "Doniphon" in the [[Star Wars Miniatures|''Star Wars'' Miniatures]] scenario ''[[The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2|Mission 2: Destroying the Past]]''. According to his endnotes, the name is a reference to the [[1960s|1962]] western [[Wikipedia:The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance|''The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance'']]. Fry believed that Goodwin named Beilert Valance as a reference to the film, and in turn named Doniphon after a character in that film, Tom Doniphon.{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin5|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Conclusion|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Conclusion}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 16}} {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Doniphon}} *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin1|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 1|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 1}} {{1stID|Doniphon}} *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin2|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2}} *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin5|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Conclusion|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Conclusion}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-11-serving-the-empire|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 11: Serving the Empire}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Kwymar sector locations]] [[Category:Locations along the Hydian Way]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Doniphon locations]] }}
